problem id: ab5f7c7f
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(3) XOR SHR(2)

examples:
  10101101 -> 01000011
  10001000 -> 01100010
  10011101 -> 11001111
  01011101 -> 11111111
  11010000 -> 10110100
  00011100 -> 11100111
  01011010 -> 11000110
  00111110 -> 11111111
  00011000 -> 11000110

query: 11111001
predicted answer: 11110110
